evidence_type: Exact contribution decomposition under the frozen formula
permitted_claim: Explain the mathematical source of score change
prohibited_claim: Causal driver; within-cell regulation; clinical utility

evidence_type: Multicohort association with prespecified pathway change

prohibited_claim: State that a pathway drives score change or treatment response

permitted_claim: Describe a potential cell source of component genes
prohibited_claim: Infer cell abundance or within-cell transcription from bulk RNA

permitted_claim: Limited clinical anchoring if the formal gate is met
prohibited_claim: Prognostic validation, monitoring utility or treatment guidance

evidence_type: Causal mechanism or clinical decision utility
